narrative:
Ballville A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 837 registered voters, with 47.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.5 percentage points.
